strengths: 15+ years of continuous, hands-on engineering across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — meets the minimum experience threshold
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) signals a timely pivot toward the role's core focus
Demonstrated entrepreneurial streak: founded GISCollective, built open-source tooling (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and delivered public workshops — aligns with the 'builder fluency' preference
concerns: No advanced degree in an AI-related field; educational background is in general computer science and fine arts, both undergraduate-level
AI experience is narrow and very recent (6 months at re:cinq); no demonstrated AI products or platforms built at meaningful scale
Current career gap since October 2025 with no stated rationale raises uncertainty about readiness for a director-level, full-time IC role
response.justification: Bogdan brings solid generalist engineering depth and a genuine builder mentality, but the Principal Engineer (AI Strategy) role demands recognized, demonstrated AI expertise — the kind that shapes product strategy, advises strategic customers, and inspires external audiences. His AI exposure is limited to a six-month staff role focused on developer tooling, with no evidence of AI products shipped at scale or thought leadership in the AI space. The gap between his current profile and the preferred qualifications (AI-focused graduate degree, recognized expertise, large-scale AI platform delivery) is substantial, making him a weak fit for this particular seniority and specialization even though his broader engineering credentials are credible.
